title: Trump says ceasefire with Iran is over, calling its leaders ‘scum’
summary_full: The president declared an end to the truce at a NATO summit in Turkey after the U.S. and Iran exchanged dozens of strikes overnight, raising the prospect of major renewed hostilities.
summary_public: The president declared an end to the truce at a NATO summit in Turkey after the U.S. and Iran exchanged dozens of strikes overnight, raising the prospect of major renewed hostilities.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: U.S. and Iran exchanged dozens of strikes overnight, raising the prospect of major renewed hostilities.
